# MoE, State Space, and Specialized Models

Not every model stresses the inference stack in the same way.

## Chapter Job

Explain why model architecture changes serving behavior.

## MoE Topics

- Expert routing.
- Active parameters versus total parameters.
- Load balance.
- Expert parallelism.
- Network pressure.
- Batch composition.
- Tail latency risks.

## State-Space and Alternative Architectures

- Why non-attention architectures are attractive for long sequences.
- What changes in memory and compute profile.
- What serving engines need to support.

## Specialized Models

- Embedding models.
- Rerankers.
- Vision-language models.
- Speech models.
- Small language models as probes and production workhorses.
